content.en:
The city of no distance.

There are a lot of Ten Realm-level masters and half-step perfect masters gathered here, some of them came to see the excitement, and some of them came to participate in the assessment of the Daoless Tower.

After all, once you become a member of the Wudao Tower, the future is equivalent to having a big backer, and the future is unlimited!

As for whether you can become a member of the Daoless Tower, how do you know if you don't try?

Therefore, some half-step perfect controllers or Ten Realm-level controllers who are very weak also dare to give it a try.

......

In the depths of the city of no distance, two figures stood here, all the time and space around them were frozen, they seemed to be the most perfect existence, a wisp of breath could collapse the endless time and space, and the body of the half-step perfect controller collapsed.

They are the perfect controllers from the Pathless Tower, and they are also the two examiners in charge of the recruitment of the members of the Pathless Tower.

"There are quite a few cultivators who have come to participate in our Daoless Pagoda this time!"

"After all, our Daoless Pagoda is very powerful, ranking among the nine most powerful forces in the Eternal Ruins, and it has been a long time since we recruited members, so there are naturally very few cultivators who want to enter the Daoless Tower, but the number is even more than the last time. "

"Most cultivators have little room for improvement, and if they are recruited, it is also a waste of resources, and they have to eliminate more than ninety percent of the cultivators first. "

"How should I be assessed this time?"

"This time it can be roughly divided into two levels: the Ten Realm-level Masters and the Half-Step Perfect Masters, these two levels have different strengths, so naturally they can't be used in the same way. In this way, the Ten Realm-level masters let them enter the Ink Demon Realm, and whoever kills an Ink Demon will be able to complete their goal. As for the half-step perfect controller, throw it into the Blood Rain Realm and kill a Blood Demon Ancestor Beast, and you can pass the assessment. "

"Then so be it, anyway, at their level, almost all of them have will clones, even if they die, they will only suffer a greater loss, and they will not really fall. "

Soon.

Wudao Tower announced the first round of assessment methods this time.

When the Ten Realm-level masters learned that they were going to enter the Ink Demon Realm to hunt an Ink Demon, they were immediately stunned.

"It's too demanding this time, right, to kill an ink demon?"

"It's too difficult, I give up, I don't want to die, even if it's a will, I don't want to fall. "

"Yes, this requirement is too difficult, the strength of the ink demon is too strong, comparable to the top Ten Realms-level controllers, and it is difficult to kill, and more importantly, the ink demons are group life, the speed of support is very fast, once they are surrounded by many ink demons, the top Ten Realm-level controllers will fall!"

"Let's join forces, right? If we join forces to kill the Ink Demon, it's okay too!"

"Hehe, join forces? If you really kill an ink demon, who will you give it to first? If it is given to someone, what if the other party leaves the ink demon realm directly?"

"Unless it's someone who is very familiar with and trusts, it's worth trusting, otherwise forget it!"

"I'm leaving, anyway, there are very few people who have joined the Wudao Tower, I originally wanted to rely on luck, but the first round of assessment turned out to be based on strength, so let's go!"

In the blink of an eye, many of the Ten Realm-level controllers were gone.

And the half-step perfect controller is also panicking.

"This ...... Let's enter the Blood Rain Realm, this is too dangerous, the Blood Rain Realm is a forbidden place known as a half-step perfect controller, the Blood Demon Ancestral Beast inside is too difficult to kill, in an environment like the Blood Rain Realm, it is almost difficult to kill!"

"I always knew that the recruitment requirements for the Wudao Tower were very demanding, but I didn't expect it to be so harsh!"

"Forget it, I'm not going to take the assessment!"

Many half-step perfectionists have given up.

And the Ten Elements Ancestor was also dumbfounded, he knew that he had no hope of passing this assessment, his strength was considered very strong among the several half-step perfect controllers of the Origin Realm Sea, but if it was placed on the side of the Eternal Ruins, it would be too weak!

"I'll give up too!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor came to Ye Tian's side and said, "Ye Tian'er, I have given up participating in the assessment of the Daoless Tower!"

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded, and did not persuade anything, after all, if the master went to participate in this assessment, the possibility of the fall of the will clone was too great.

Moreover, this is only the first round of assessment, and the Ten Elements Ancestor has no hope.

And the Black Decay Controller didn't give up the assessment of the Ten Realms Controller, he wanted to give it a go.

It didn't take long.

A space-time portal has appeared in the City of Distance.

At this moment, a perfect master appeared.

As soon as the other party appeared, it attracted the attention of countless cultivators.

"Everyone, I am the Lord of the Blood Separation of the Wudao Tower, this time I am responsible for recruiting members, the first round of assessment, you need to enter the Ink Demon Realm, whoever brings out an Ink Demon corpse can pass the assessment. Remember, don't cheat. The Lord of Blood Separation introduced.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to spy on the Lord of Blood Separation at this moment, but the other party did not react.

Obviously, after the replication talent is upgraded, even the perfect controller can't perceive it.

"It's a pity that he doesn't have a perfect-level ancestral endowment on him!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

A Ten Realm-level master came to the Ink Demon Realm through this space-time passage.

......

As soon as they entered the Ink Demon Realm, all the Ten Realm-level masters were teleported to different areas, and they were unable to resist.

Obviously, this was done by the Lord of Blood, which was to prevent them from joining forces in the first place.

Of course, they can also rush together, but the Ink Demon Realm is also very dangerous, and it is very likely that if they do not converge, they will encounter a lot of Ink Demons.

After Ye Tian entered the Ink Demon Realm, he immediately used his copying talent to perceive the situation around him.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to perceive the existence of the Ink Demon, and it was not one, but dozens of Ink Demons.

These ink demons are black and purple, very ugly, but they are very fast, so they exude a black-purple aura that can corrupt time and space.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled over, and immediately unleashed his perfect body, the heaven-devouring battle body, and immediately cast ten thousand blades, and slammed into the body of an ink demon with one blow.

In an instant, the vitality of this ink demon was shattered by Ye Tian, and it immediately turned into a corpse.

Immediately, Ye Tian put away the corpse of the ink demon.

At this time, what Ye Tian didn't know was that the Blood Separation Lord from the outside world was watching here and sensing the situation here.

"Kill an ink demon with one blow, this Ten Realms-level controller has a strength comparable to that of a half-step perfection-level master, an absolute demon, there should be hope to become a member of our Daoless Tower!"

The Lord of Blood Separation muttered.
